{{Infobox location
| name = Urg’naut's tomb
| introduced = Of Killers and Kings
}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Urg’naut's tomb]] is a castle that was a fortification raised during the [[Elder War]].}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:Of Killers and Kings]]
